changeSet.author: gfh
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE org_units DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_org_unit_type;
UPDATE org_units SET type = 'OTDEL' WHERE type = 'UNIT';
ALTER TABLE org_units ADD CONSTRAINT chk_org_unit_type CHECK (type IN ('BLOCK','DEPARTMENT','SLUZHBA','OTDEL','SEKTOR'));
UPDATE users SET role = 'ORG_HEAD' WHERE role IN ('HEAD_OF_DEPARTMENT','HEAD_OF_DEPARTMENT_UNIT');
